title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down how Alex Hormozi uses AI across his businesses through a four-pillar system: data as competitive advantage, voice-first interaction, workflow decomposition, and compounding effects. The video includes guidance on avoiding a common team mistake and frameworks applicable to various AI tools.
